# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

apiGateways:
  my-api-gateway:
    service: kong
    replicas: 3
    image: docker.konghq.com/kong:2.6.0
    ports:
      http: 8000:8000
      admin: 8444:8001
    env:
      KONG_DATABASE: postgres
      KONG_PG_HOST: postgres
      KONG_ADMIN_LISTEN: 0.0.0.0
      KONG_ADMIN_LISTEN_PORT: 8443
      KONG_PROXY_LISTEN: 0.0.0.0
      K Kong_PROXY_LISTEN_PORT: 8000
      KONG_PG_PASSWORD: my_password
    volumeMounts:
      - name: kong-db
        mountPath: /var/lib/kong

services:
  my-microservice1:
    image: my-registry/my-microservice1:latest
    ports:
      - "8080:8080"

services:
  my-microservice2:
    image: my-registry/my-microservice2:latest
    ports:
      - "8081:8081"

plugins:
  custom_header:
    service: konghq/kong-plugin-custom-header
    version: 3.6.1

upstreams:
  my-microservice1:
    host: my-microservice1
    port: 8080

  my-microservice2:
    host: my-microservice2
    port: 8081

routes:
  my-route1:
    service: my-api-gateway
    routes:
      - path: /api/v1/endpoint1
        strip_path: 0
        upstream: my-microservice1
        plugins:
          - custom_header:
              header_names: X-Custom-Header
              set_header: true
              header_values: "Hello, World!"

  my-route2:
    service: my-api-gateway
    routes:
      - path: /api/v1/endpoint2
        strip_path: 0
        upstream: my-microservice2
